title: Few-Shot Named Entity Recognition for Low-Resource South Asian Languages via Cross-Lingual Transfer
venue: Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2024)
abstract: We present a novel few-shot approach to NER for low-resource South Asian languages that combines cross-lingual transfer from multilingual BERT with targeted data augmentation, achieving state-of-the-art F1 on Hindi, Bengali, and Tamil with as few as 50 labelled sentences per language.

title: Empirical Analysis of API Gateway Design Patterns in High-Throughput Python Microservice Environments
venue: Under Review — IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering
abstract: An empirical study benchmarking five common API gateway design patterns — reverse proxy, sidecar, BFF, service mesh, and API composition — across latency, failure-recovery, and developer-experience dimensions in Python-based microservice deployments at 100–5000 req/s.
